title: Introduction to Programming
description: Fundamental concepts of programming using Java, covering variables, loops, conditionals, and basic algorithms

title: Data Structures and Algorithms
description: Advanced study of data structures including trees, graphs, hash tables, and algorithm analysis

title: Database Management Systems
description: Introduction to relational databases, SQL, database design, and normalization

title: Web Development Fundamentals
description: Full-stack web development covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks

title: Software Engineering Principles
description: Software development lifecycle, agile methodologies, testing, and project management

title: Machine Learning Basics
description: Introduction to machine learning algorithms, supervised and unsupervised learning

title: Computer Networks
description: Network protocols, OSI model, TCP/IP, routing, and network security fundamentals

title: Operating Systems
description: Process management, memory management, file systems, and concurrency

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Security principles, cryptography, network security, and ethical hacking basics

title: Mobile App Development
description: Building Android and iOS applications using cross-platform frameworks

title: Cloud Computing
description: AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud platforms, serverless architecture, and deployment strategies

title: Artificial Intelligence
description: Search algorithms, knowledge representation, natural language processing, and AI ethics

title: Big Data Analytics
description: Hadoop, Spark, data processing pipelines, and analytics techniques for large datasets

title: DevOps Practices
description: CI/CD pipelines, containerization with Docker, orchestration with Kubernetes

title: User Experience Design
description: UI/UX principles, user research, prototyping, and usability testing

title: Blockchain Technology
description: Cryptocurrency, smart contracts, decentralized applications, and consensus mechanisms

title: Embedded Systems
description: Microcontrollers, IoT devices, real-time operating systems, and hardware-software integration

title: Game Development
description: Unity game engine, 2D and 3D game design, physics, and game mechanics

title: Robotics Programming
description: Robot control systems, sensor integration, path planning, and autonomous navigation

title: Technical Writing and Communication
description: Documentation, technical reports, presentations, and effective communication for engineers
